conflict: Now that the trap has a name, the couple has to decide whether to exploit, endure, or sabotage it while keeping Leela safe.
consequence: Nita and Ben become active co-conspirators, recovering old collaborative intelligence even as the marriage continues to die.
must_land_beats: The chapter should show paper, handwriting, and manual planning as a counter-texture to optimized life.
Their best teamwork resurfaces specifically because the enemy is externalized.
They choose a campaign of daily misalignment rather than one flashy break, because parental responsibility narrows their options.
The renewed warmth of collaboration must be emotionally dangerous, not merely efficient.
pressure_source: Now that the trap has a name, the couple has to decide whether to exploit, endure, or sabotage it while keeping Leela safe.
state_shift: Nita and Ben become active co-conspirators, recovering old collaborative intelligence even as the marriage continues to die.
